title: Immersive Valley
description: Modpack that includes better immersion, improved gameplay and graphics optimizations.
body:
### **NOTE:** this project has been discontinued.

![Immersive Valley](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/adce9207d2379ccb1926e857a4c19c68928bf674.png)

**_A compilation of mods for singleplayer gameplay improvement, optimizations included._**

## Improved and optimized graphics
![Nether with shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4f4ced14341b880693dce0021c748834c87485d.jpeg)
It was _essential_ to include mods that **improve graphics** and **optimize** the game's rendering and frames.

Popular graphics and optimization mods were featured such as Sodium, Iris Shaders Entity Culling and etc.

Shaderpack _**Complimentary Shaders**_ is installed with custom configurations included!


## Increased immersion
![Pillager with animations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a56c78b0a521cf40226af107a92db8b2b4f9e780.jpeg)
The _vision_ for this modpack was **to be as aesthetically pleasing as possible** outside of only adding shaders.

Mods such as Not Enough Animations bring life to otherwise dull and static vanilla mobs, while adding flare to player animations as well.
Other mods like Ambient Sounds, Presence Footsteps and Sound Physics Remastered rework the ambience of the game and allows you to sink into the enviroments you enter with _amazing_ SFX, and etc.


## Client-side improvements
![What-am-I-looking-at and Item Notifier GUI Improvements](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e283feef8a938c19bb50914a9d5a9b25a0c2298a.jpeg)
![Item highlight and food UI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73937411a32ff14c668fdae8f7d9d7febd90d8ee.jpeg)
It was _important_ to set some priorities and add some **non-intrusive client-side gameplay and UI improvments** to the game.

While exploring, sometimes it's useful to know what you're looking at and know what you pick up on the fly, so, mods Jade and Pick Up Notifier do just that (_custom configurated_)!
Mods like AppleSkin and Item Borders allow you to know how much saturation and healing food will provide and show item rarity in item slot respectively, for example, the Golden Apple in the screenshot below demonstrates those 2 mods!


## Vanilla+ mods
### New additions

![Shaders with End City](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e47ea5b185f215793a7e3f2aaa62b69e88775591.jpeg)
To keep the game **interesting** and less stale, some mods were added to **improve long-term vanilla-style gameplay without adding too much content**.

Moog's End Structures, as it implies, adds more structures to the End dimension, the exploration there will feel a bit less empty and will still feel incredibly vanilla, while Tidal Towns adds a new type of village in the oceans, completely unobtrusively and blending in with the game's style.

### Improvements and tweaks
![Anvil and enchanting table improvements showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/242a2201ce5dd644a9dfdfe8dc97b5a14390f18c.jpeg)
These next mods were _purposefully_ added to **improve quality of life**, simple as that.

The compilation of Easy mods such as Easy Anvils and Easy Magic make gameplay mechanics for anvils and enchanting tables so much more convenient, allowing those entities to hold storage.
Other compilation of tweaks like Mooshroom Tweaks, Realistic Bees and Spawn-Proofed Villagers change behavior and aesthetics of these mobs for better experience.

_For a full list of mods, keep reading!_


## Resource pack compatibility
![Nether with shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc9a27dbd220f16243f647d679acf2d39d422d0f.jpeg)
![3D resource pack compatibility](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5b9f06d5d953acbbd1b8b430e56512784b37913.jpeg)
For other mods and resource packs, mods Entity Model Features and Entity Texture Features were added for compatibility.

Author personally endorses the use of the following resource packs for _better_ experience:
- [**Nautilus3D**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/nautilus3d) **highly recommended**
- [**Animated Items**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/animated-items)
- [**Cherry Grove+**](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/cherry-grove-5876802/) (_non-Modrinth content / includes paid content_)
- [**Colorful Containers GUI**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/colourful-containers-gui) or [**Colorful Containers Dark Mode GUI**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/colourful-containers-dark-mode-gui)
- [**Creeping Ivy**](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/creeping-ivy/) (_non-Modrinth content_)
- [**Enhanced Moon**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enhanced-moon)
- [**Enhanced Sun**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enhanced-sun)
- [**Fancy Crops**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fancy-crops)
- [**Fresh Animations**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)
- [**Fresh Moves**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tras-fresh-player)
- [**Low Fire**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/low-fire-pack)
- [**Nature X**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/nature-x) **highly recommended**
> _in order to use **Nature X** properly with the modpack, all the ore textures, its emissives and grass colormap image files must be manually removed_
- [**Vervada's Enhanced Plants**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/3d-plants)


## Disclaimers and warning

- This modpack is client-side and was made **for singleplayer use only**. _Use on servers at your own discretion_.
- Immersive Valley is a project made to output creativity and be shared with people. **This is not a product made by Mojang or Microsoft, nor is it approved by and associated with these companies**.
- **Immersive Valley does NOT claim any creations included in the pack to be original, outside of the modpack branding**. Everything used in this project can be _easily_ found on Modrinth.
- Fork and remix the pack for personal use or your own project, but **do NOT use Immersive Valley branding** such as name and logo to represent your own modpacks remixes and forks.
- _This project does not use nor endorse any personal use additions such as hacks and other client-side and server-side advantage cheats._
- **Immersive Valley modpack is ONLY available on Modrinth**. Please do not pay for and download anything labeled as Immersive Valley anywhere else, as this project is free-to-use and download, and does not endorse any sales.
